name: @holdfastprotocol/oracle
description: Reputation oracle for Holdfast Protocol devnet — trust infrastructure for autonomous AI agents on Solana

scripts.test: tsc && node --test dist/config.test.js dist/evaluator.test.js dist/idl-offset.test.js dist/subscriber.test.js dist/pending.test.js dist/voter.test.js dist/oracle-flow.test.js dist/multisig-quorum.test.js dist/agent-registry/subscriber.test.js dist/agent-registry/responder.test.js dist/agent-registry/atom-engine-submitter.test.js
scripts.coverage: tsc && c8 node --test dist/config.test.js dist/evaluator.test.js dist/idl-offset.test.js dist/subscriber.test.js dist/pending.test.js dist/voter.test.js dist/oracle-flow.test.js dist/multisig-quorum.test.js dist/agent-registry/subscriber.test.js dist/agent-registry/responder.test.js dist/agent-registry/atom-engine-submitter.test.js
